assertions.title: Run Comparison emits collapsed MappingDto (v2 wire)

steps.action: Load file_a.csv and file_b.csv, select key id on both sides, select two manual comparison pairs, and click Run Comparison
steps.expected: Compare request body contains collapsed MappingDto entries only
steps.observed: POST /compare body contained column_mappings with two entries using keys file_a_column, file_b_column, mapping_type only (no MappingRequest/MappingResponse wrapper keys).

steps.action: Inspect captured compare request payload schema
steps.expected: Each mapping has exactly required v2 fields (+ optional similarity)

assertions.title: Save comparison snapshot produces v2 JSON download

steps.action: From results step, click Save result
steps.expected: POST /comparison-snapshot/save returns 200 and browser downloads snapshot JSON
steps.observed: Captured snapshot save response status 200 from /api/sessions/e781613e-1231-41af-bf5b-2a0e2674f5e5/comparison-snapshot/save

steps.expected: Top-level includes version:2 and required sections
steps.observed: Downloaded JSON has version 2 and keys ['file_a', 'file_b', 'mappings', 'normalization', 'results', 'selection', 'summary', 'version']

assertions.title: Load v1.x snapshot shows explicit incompatibility (v2 behavior)

steps.action: Reset to step 1 and upload a legacy v1 snapshot fixture via Load result
steps.expected: Load fails with explicit version incompatibility message (not generic parse error)
steps.observed: UI showed: "Unsupported comparison snapshot version 1 — this file was produced by an older csv-align release. Re-run the comparison in v2."

steps.action: Inspect load response body and status
steps.observed: Status 400 with body {"code":"bad_input","error":"Unsupported comparison snapshot version 1 — this file was produced by an older csv-align release. Re-run the comparison in v2."}

assertions.title: No legacy duplicate identifiers in wire or DOM

steps.action: Run comparison and inspect captured compare response payload
steps.expected: No duplicate_filea/duplicate_fileb tokens; result types conform to v2 names
steps.observed: Compare status 200; observed result_type values ['match', 'mismatch', 'missing_left', 'missing_right'] (subset of allowed v2 values).

steps.action: Search rendered DOM text for legacy duplicate identifiers
steps.expected: DOM contains no duplicate_filea or duplicate_fileb
steps.observed: No legacy duplicate identifiers found in captured DOM text.

frictions.description: agent-browser warned that --download-path was ignored after daemon startup; downloads still succeeded to the original session download path.
frictions.resolution: Started the session with the correct download path and copied the latest downloaded artifact to a deterministic evidence filename.
